heading: Additional regulations for Marine Corps
label: 8212 Additional regulations for Marine Corps
text: The President may prescribe military regulations for the discipline of the Marine Corps.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)6012.34 U.S.C. 714R.S. 1620.The words “such” and “as he may deem expedient” are omitted as surplusage.
